commit_scope: Resolve PR #3650 stale follow-through by making the FNRI fkwu witness platform-aware on Windows and aligning /sense iPhone copy with current browser permissions.

local_validation.notes: The first index check found stale MANIFEST.md and scripts/INDEX.md after rebase; python3 scripts/generate_repo_indexes.py refreshed both, and the final --check passed. make wellness completed and named pre-existing registry drift that is handled on the mesh registry branch, not introduced by this repair. The phone-presence band returned 4095 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. scripts/fnri_fkwu_witness.sh returned 4095 and PASS on mac binary dispatch; scripts/verify_fnri_windows_standalone.sh returned the FNRI 32767 band and the form-cli 4095 band with fourth-arm proof. The first CI rerun proved the Windows fkwu branch no longer ran Mac dispatch, then exposed that the same FNRI step required form/form-cli before the workflow builds it; this record now covers the Windows bootstrap gate skip for that step.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push to PR #3650 and GitHub Windows Host Floor rerun.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deploy verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: /sense iPhone copy no longer advertises microphone or camera access while current global Permissions-Policy denies both; PR #3650 Windows Host Floor should no longer invoke Mac-only form-cli dispatch or require form/form-cli inside the standalone FNRI Windows step.
test_flows: Open /sense and confirm the iPhone card describes remembered context, trusted-call tel/CallKit lanes, and the live web surface without promising mic/camera access.
After push, confirm Windows Host Floor reruns scripts/verify_fnri_windows_standalone.sh without FAIL: form-cli fnri witness= want 32767 or FAIL: bootstrap receipt.
After merge and deploy, run the public web/API verification flow for the release thread.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof for the stale PR repair passed. CI and deploy validation remain pending until the branch is pushed and PR checks complete.

evidence_refs: scripts/fnri_fkwu_witness.sh now keeps the fkwu source band on every platform while running verify_fnri_mac_binary_dispatch.sh only on Darwin; Windows leaves standalone dispatch to scripts/verify_fnri_windows_standalone.sh.
scripts/verify_fnri_windows_standalone.sh now skips verify_fsh_fnri_bootstrap.sh on Windows because the workflow proves native form-cli in the following Windows step.
scripts/verify_fnri_windows_standalone.sh passed locally on macOS with FNRI verdict 32767 and form-cli-band verdict 4095; CI must prove the Windows uname branch.
web/app/sense/page.tsx no longer advertises mic/camera on the iPhone card while web/next.config.ts denies camera and microphone through Permissions-Policy.
specs/trusted-phone-presence.md now records that microphone/camera lanes require a future Permissions-Policy change and runtime receipts.
phone-presence validation returned 4095 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent.
